free_text: Measurement of some average cross sections for
activation in the spotaneous fission neutron filed of
Discs 10.0 mm in diameter and thickness from 0.1 to
0.7 mm from natural mixture of isotopes
Neutron fluence was calculated assuming a point source
and 1/r2 dependence which was checked by measurement
of 115In(n,inl) reaction rate in different points
Correction for the thermal background neutrons
in the measured capture cross-sections have been found
Special corrections were introduced to take care of
the counting geometry which was different from that
used in the measurement of the efficiency.
The gamma-ray absorption in the samples was
The dead time correction was negligibly small
Statistical error and uncertainties in the
